website/src/App.tsx.intent: Root router with lazy-loaded pages, ProtectedRoute gating via ROUTE_PERMISSIONS, wrapped in AuthProvider + LocationProvider + TimezoneProvider
website/src/App.tsx.notes: Uses React.lazy + Suspense; ROUTE_PERMISSIONS maps routes to required permission strings

website/src/main.tsx.intent: Application entry point that mounts the React tree inside BrowserRouter

website/src/vite-env.d.ts.intent: Vite client environment type declarations for import.meta.env
website/src/vite-env.d.ts.notes: Generated reference file; no custom types

website/src/test/setup.ts.intent: Vitest global test setup that mocks matchMedia and IntersectionObserver

website/src/pages/index.ts.intent: Barrel export for all page components consumed by App.tsx

website/src/pages/Login.tsx.intent: Login form with email persistence via localStorage and auto-abort on unmount
website/src/pages/Login.tsx.notes: Saves last-used email in localStorage; uses AuthContext.login

website/src/pages/Overview.tsx.intent: Dashboard home with three zones: patient check-in, today's services table, and today's appointment list
website/src/pages/Overview.tsx.notes: Three-zone layout; wraps children in AppointmentHoverProvider; synced to global location filter

website/src/pages/Customers.tsx.intent: Patient records page with search, location-filtered DataTable, and side-panel CustomerProfile with full CRUD
website/src/pages/Customers.tsx.notes: Soft-delete and hard-delete; opens profile via URL param :id; URL navigation for deep-links

website/src/pages/Calendar.tsx.intent: Appointment calendar with Day/Week/Month views, doctor filter, drag-reschedule, and edit modal
website/src/pages/Calendar.tsx.notes: ViewMode: day|week|month; drag-drop via useDragReschedule; synced to global location filter

website/src/pages/Appointments/index.tsx.intent: Appointment management list with search, date range filter, check-in flow, wait timer, and service conversion
website/src/pages/Appointments/index.tsx.notes: Expandable rows for CheckInFlow and WaitTimer; synced to global location filter

website/src/pages/Payment.tsx.intent: Payment page with deposit wallet, single-record payment form, outstanding balances, and payment history
website/src/pages/Payment.tsx.notes: Synced to global location filter; wraps DepositWallet, PaymentForm, OutstandingBalance, PaymentHistory

website/src/pages/Employees/index.tsx.intent: Staff management page with table/card view, tier/role filters, and detailed employee profile panel
website/src/pages/Employees/index.tsx.notes: Synced to global location filter; EmployeeForm modal for create/edit

website/src/pages/Locations.tsx.intent: Clinic branch management with grid of LocationCards, detail panel, and dashboard metrics
website/src/pages/Locations.tsx.notes: Status filter: active|renovation|closed; edit inline via LocationDetail

website/src/pages/Services/index.tsx.intent: Service records management with status tabs, service form, and multi-visit tracker
website/src/pages/Services/index.tsx.notes: Status tabs: active|completed|cancelled|all; synced to global location filter

website/src/pages/Settings/index.tsx.intent: System settings page with tabs for system preferences, bank account, and IP access control
website/src/pages/Settings/index.tsx.notes: Tabs: system|bank|ip; delegates to SystemPreferencesContent, BankSettingsForm, IpAccessControl

website/src/pages/Website.tsx.intent: Public website CMS with tabs for pages list, content editor, service catalog, and SEO manager
website/src/pages/Website.tsx.notes: Tabs: pages|editor|services|seo; delegates to PageList, PageEditor, ServiceCatalogManager, SEOManager

website/src/pages/Commission.tsx.intent: Placeholder page for employee commission tracking and rule configuration
website/src/pages/Commission.tsx.notes: Stub UI only; no data connected

website/src/pages/Reports.tsx.intent: Placeholder page for analytics and business intelligence reporting
website/src/pages/Reports.tsx.notes: Stub UI only; no data connected

website/src/pages/Notifications.tsx.intent: Placeholder page for SMS and email notification template management
website/src/pages/Notifications.tsx.notes: Stub UI only; shows channel cards (SMS, Email, Push)

website/src/pages/Relationships.tsx.intent: Permission matrix and entity relationship visualization page with two tabs
website/src/pages/Relationships.tsx.notes: Tabs: permissions|entities; delegates to PermissionMatrix and EntityRelationshipMap

website/src/pages/PermissionBoard.tsx.intent: Permission board showing per-employee permission group assignments across modules and actions
website/src/pages/PermissionBoard.tsx.notes: Uses usePermissionBoard; MODULES array drives the permission matrix

website/src/pages/ServiceCatalog.tsx.intent: Product/service catalog management page with sidebar category groups and services table with CRUD
website/src/pages/ServiceCatalog.tsx.notes: Fetches from real API (products, productcategories, companies); paginated table

website/src/components/Layout.tsx.intent: App shell with collapsible sidebar nav, nested submenu hover, and Outlet for page content
website/src/components/Layout.tsx.notes: Sidebar uses useRef for nested hover submenu; includes VersionDisplay and PermissionDebugger

website/src/components/appointments/Appo.intent: Create appointment modal form with customer, doctor, location, service, date/time, and color picker
website/src/components/appointments/Appo.notes: Part of APPOINTMENT MODULE FAMILY (CREATE variant); must stay consistent with EditAppointmentModal

website/src/components/appointments/Appo.intent: Unit tests for AppointmentForm covering render, field interaction, and form submission
website/src/components/appointments/Appo.notes: Vitest + React Testing Library; mocks useCustomers, useEmployees, useLocations, api

website/src/components/appointments/Chec.intent: Step-by-step check-in status workflow: arrival to waiting to in-treatment to done
website/src/components/appointments/Chec.notes: Renders WaitTimer inline; calls onAdvance to progress status

website/src/components/appointments/Conv.intent: Action button to convert a completed appointment into a service record
website/src/components/appointments/Conv.notes: Only renders when checkInStatus === done; shows converted badge once done

website/src/components/appointments/Wait.intent: Live second-by-second wait time display calculated from arrivalTime or treatmentStartTime
website/src/components/appointments/Wait.notes: Updates every second via setInterval; supports compact mode for inline display

website/src/components/calendar/Appointm.intent: Compact appointment summary card with status dot, color-coded left border, and edit button
website/src/components/calendar/Appointm.notes: Color codes 0-7 from APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS constants; used in Week and Day views

website/src/components/calendar/Appointm.intent: Full appointment detail overlay (VIEW variant) showing all appointment fields read-only
website/src/components/calendar/Appointm.notes: Part of APPOINTMENT MODULE FAMILY (VIEW variant); status labels must match AppointmentForm

website/src/components/calendar/DayView..intent: Single-day appointment grid grouped by half-hour slots with responsive auto-fill columns
website/src/components/calendar/DayView..notes: LAYOUT LOCK: auto-fill grid; each card has color-coded left border from APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS

website/src/components/calendar/MonthVie.intent: Monthly calendar grid displaying per-day appointment counts grouped by status
website/src/components/calendar/MonthVie.notes: Vietnamese weekday headers T2-CN; day cells show status count badges

website/src/components/calendar/TimeSlot.intent: Time slot row displaying appointments at a given time with optional compact mode
website/src/components/calendar/TimeSlot.notes: Used in DayView and legacy TodaySchedule; compact mode for sidebar use

website/src/components/calendar/WeekView.intent: Seven-column week view with stacked appointment cards per day and click-to-edit support
website/src/components/calendar/WeekView.notes: Cards show status badge, name, phone, doctor, time, service; color from APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS

website/src/components/customer/Appointm.intent: Past appointments list shown inside a customer profile with status icons
website/src/components/customer/Appointm.notes: Supports limit prop to truncate to N most recent appointments

website/src/components/customer/Customer.intent: Full customer profile side panel with personal info and tabs for appointments, services, payments, deposits, checkups, and photos
website/src/components/customer/Customer.notes: Multi-tab panel; uses real API data; includes HealthCheckupGallery and DepositWallet

website/src/components/customer/Customer.intent: Unit tests for CustomerProfile covering render and tab navigation

website/src/components/customer/DepositC.intent: Wallet balance card showing total top-ups, payments, and recent transaction history
website/src/components/customer/DepositC.notes: Displays formatted VND amounts; read-only summary view

website/src/components/customer/HealthCh.intent: Gallery of external health-checkup images from hosoonline.com with lightbox and upload support
website/src/components/customer/HealthCh.notes: Uses createExternalCheckup API; shows loading and error states

website/src/components/customer/index.ts.intent: Barrel export for all customer profile sub-components

website/src/components/customer/PhotoGal.intent: Before/after dental photo gallery with lightbox navigation
website/src/components/customer/PhotoGal.notes: Placeholder cards when no photos available; before=amber theme, after=emerald theme

website/src/components/customer/ServiceH.intent: Treatment history list with inline status dropdown to update service record status
website/src/components/customer/ServiceH.notes: Uses StatusDropdown for inline status change; supports limit prop

website/src/components/debug/PermissionD.intent: Development overlay panel to inspect current user permissions for all modules
website/src/components/debug/PermissionD.notes: Dev-only tool; reads from useAuth; shows check/cross per KEY_PERMISSIONS

website/src/components/employees/Employe.intent: Employee grid card showing avatar, tier badge, role chips, location, and schedule status
website/src/components/employees/Employe.notes: Uses TIER_LABELS, ROLE_LABELS, STATUS_BADGE_STYLES from mockEmployees constants

website/src/components/employees/Employe.intent: Modal form for creating and editing employee records with real API integration
website/src/components/employees/Employe.notes: Part of FORM FAMILY matching AddCustomerForm design standard; uses createEmployee/updateEmployee API

website/src/components/employees/Employe.intent: Employee detail panel showing personal info, stats, location, and linked team members
website/src/components/employees/Employe.notes: Fetches company list for location display; uses fetchCompanies API

website/src/components/employees/Employe.intent: Sortable paginated table of employees with tier, role, and status columns
website/src/components/employees/Employe.notes: Wraps shared DataTable; uses StatusBadge for active/inactive display

website/src/components/employees/LinkedE.intent: Shows team relationships panel listing colleagues linked to an employee
website/src/components/employees/LinkedE.notes: Displays tier and role badges for each linked employee

website/src/components/employees/Referra.intent: Shows employee referral code with copy button and referral stats
website/src/components/employees/Referra.notes: Copy-to-clipboard with visual feedback; stats are stub until API connected

website/src/components/employees/RoleMul.intent: Toggle chip selector for employee role filter with optional All tab and counts display
website/src/components/employees/RoleMul.notes: Can show role counts via counts prop; single-select (not multi)

website/src/components/employees/Schedul.intent: Weekly availability grid showing employee schedule blocks across days and time slots
website/src/components/employees/Schedul.notes: Uses WEEK_DAYS and TIME_SLOTS from constants; read-only display

website/src/components/employees/TierSel.intent: Toggle chip selector for employee tier filter with optional All tab and counts display
website/src/components/employees/TierSel.notes: Tier data not in DB; kept for future use; can show tier counts via counts prop

website/src/components/forms/AddCustomer.intent: Full customer creation/edit modal with independent card-scrolling layout, photo upload, referral code, and appointment booking
website/src/components/forms/AddCustomer.notes: Reference implementation for independent card-scrolling pattern; CardSection with maxHeight

website/src/components/forms/WalkInForm..intent: Minimal walk-in patient modal that creates a customer plus appointment (arrived) plus optional sale order in one flow
website/src/components/forms/WalkInForm..notes: Calls createPartner + createAppointment + createSaleOrder; uses useUniqueCheck for dedup

website/src/components/forms/WalkInForm..intent: Unit tests for WalkInForm covering API call orchestration and form submission

website/src/components/locations/Locatio.intent: Branch summary card showing name, address, status badge, staff count, and phone
website/src/components/locations/Locatio.notes: Uses STATUS_LABELS and STATUS_STYLES from mockLocations constants

website/src/components/locations/Locatio.intent: Mini metrics dashboard for a branch showing appointments, patients, rating, and revenue
website/src/components/locations/Locatio.notes: Reads from LocationMetrics type; used inside LocationDetail

website/src/components/locations/Locatio.intent: Full branch detail panel with editable info, staff list, and embedded LocationDashboard
website/src/components/locations/Locatio.notes: Inline edit mode for address, phone, email, hours; delegates metrics to LocationDashboard

website/src/components/modules/EditAppoi.intent: Edit appointment modal (EDIT variant) with customer/doctor/location/time/color fields and status change
website/src/components/modules/EditAppoi.notes: Part of APPOINTMENT MODULE FAMILY (EDIT variant); must stay in sync with AppointmentForm

website/src/components/modules/PatientCh.intent: Zone 1 treatment tracker showing arrived patients with downline status progression and wait timers
website/src/components/modules/PatientCh.notes: LAYOUT LOCK: PatientCard must not truncate content; bidirectional hover via AppointmentHoverContext

website/src/components/modules/RevenueCh.intent: Revenue vs target bar chart rendered with pure CSS height-percentage bars
website/src/components/modules/RevenueCh.notes: No chart library; uses inline style height percentage; shows trend arrows

website/src/components/modules/StatCardM.intent: Reusable dashboard KPI card showing label, value, trend change, and icon
website/src/components/modules/StatCardM.notes: changeType drives positive/negative/neutral trend icon and color

website/src/components/modules/TodayAppo.intent: Zone 3 today's appointment sidebar with filter tabs and per-card edit plus check-in actions
website/src/components/modules/TodayAppo.notes: Part of APPOINTMENT MODULE FAMILY; bidirectional hover via AppointmentHoverContext

website/src/components/modules/TodaySche.intent: Appointment timeline for today as a vertical list with time slots and status badges
website/src/components/modules/TodaySche.notes: Legacy component; uses STATUS_BADGE_STYLES from mockCalendar

website/src/components/modules/TodayServ.intent: Zone 2 placeholder table for services performed today with search input
website/src/components/modules/TodayServ.notes: Stub placeholder; data not yet connected to API

website/src/components/payment/DepositHi.intent: Transaction history list for a customer deposit wallet showing date, amount, type, and method
website/src/components/payment/DepositHi.notes: Color-codes top-up (green) vs payment (red) rows; uses DepositTransaction type

website/src/components/payment/DepositWa.intent: Wallet card showing deposit balance, outstanding balance, top-up form, and VietQR modal
website/src/components/payment/DepositWa.notes: Triggers VietQrModal for bank transfer; calls onAddDeposit callback on submit

website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.intent: Barrel export for monthly payment plan sub-components
website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.notes: Groups the three plan components for Payment page import

website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.intent: Per-installment status display chip with icon and color from a status config map
website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.notes: Presentational only; used inside PaymentSchedule rows

website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.intent: Four-step wizard for creating installment plans: customer, treatment, payment, review
website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.notes: Uses DatePicker; auto-calculates monthly installment amount; preview in review step

website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.intent: Timeline of installments for a monthly plan with mark-paid action per installment
website/src/components/payment/MonthlyPl.notes: Uses InstallmentTracker per row; calls onMarkPaid callback

website/src/components/payment/Outstandi.intent: Cards listing unpaid sale orders and dotkhams with pay-now action
website/src/components/payment/Outstandi.notes: Shows empty green state when no outstanding balance

website/src/components/payment/PaymentFo.intent: Single-record payment form supporting cash, bank transfer, deposit, and VietQR methods
website/src/components/payment/PaymentFo.notes: Fetches sale orders and dotkhams to populate record selector; integrates VietQrModal

website/src/components/payment/PaymentHi.intent: Table listing all payment transactions with method, status, amount, and linked record
website/src/components/payment/PaymentHi.notes: Uses PAYMENT_METHOD_LABELS and PAYMENT_STATUS_LABELS from mockPayment

website/src/components/payment/VietQrMod.intent: Split-panel QR code generation modal using VietQR API for bank transfer payments
website/src/components/payment/VietQrMod.notes: Reads bank settings from useBankSettings; calls uploadPaymentProof on confirmation

website/src/components/payment/VietQrMod.intent: Unit tests for VietQrModal covering render and QR URL generation

website/src/components/relationships/Ent.intent: Visual diagram of entity connections using arrow-linked nodes from static graph constants
website/src/components/relationships/Ent.notes: Static visualization from ENTITY_NODES and ENTITY_RELATIONS constants

website/src/components/relationships/Per.intent: Role-based access control grid showing which roles have which permissions per module
website/src/components/relationships/Per.notes: Collapsible module rows; check/X icons per cell; read-only display

website/src/components/services/MultiVis.intent: Progress tracker for multi-visit treatment plans showing each visit status in sequence
website/src/components/services/MultiVis.notes: Compact mode for embedded use; calls onUpdateVisit to change visit status

website/src/components/services/ServiceF.intent: Create/edit service record modal with catalog selector, customer/doctor/location, date, and visit count
website/src/components/services/ServiceF.notes: Part of FORM FAMILY matching AddCustomerForm design standard; uses real API data

website/src/components/services/ServiceH.intent: Service record list with expandable rows showing MultiVisitTracker and inline status dropdown
website/src/components/services/ServiceH.notes: Uses StatusDropdown for inline status change; expandable for multi-visit detail

website/src/components/settings/BankSett.intent: Clinic bank account configuration form for VietQR integration (BIN, account number, name)
website/src/components/settings/BankSett.notes: Uses useBankSettings hook and BankSelector dropdown; saves via updateSettings

website/src/components/settings/Customer.intent: Manage referral source list with add, toggle, and delete per source type
website/src/components/settings/Customer.notes: Uses useCustomerSources from useSettings hook; type icons mapped by source type

website/src/components/settings/IpAccess.intent: IP whitelist/blacklist management panel with add, remove, and mode toggle
website/src/components/settings/IpAccess.notes: Uses useIpAccessControl hook; validates IP format inline

website/src/components/settings/Permissi.intent: Permission group configuration with module permission matrix and employee assignment panel
website/src/components/settings/Permissi.notes: Three-section layout: group cards, permission matrix, employee assignments with location scope

website/src/components/settings/RoleConf.intent: Role definition panel showing per-role permission matrix with collapsible module groups
website/src/components/settings/RoleConf.notes: Uses useRoleConfig from useSettings; read-only grid of check marks per role

website/src/components/settings/ServiceC.intent: Service catalog settings panel with search, inline price editing, and enable/disable toggle
website/src/components/settings/ServiceC.notes: Uses useServiceCatalog from useSettings; inline edit mode per row

website/src/components/settings/SystemPr.intent: System preferences wrapper with sub-tabs for general settings and IP access control
website/src/components/settings/SystemPr.notes: Wraps SystemPreferencesContent and IpAccessControl in sub-tab navigation

website/src/components/settings/SystemPr.intent: General system preference toggles grouped by category without sub-tab navigation
website/src/components/settings/SystemPr.notes: Reads from useSystemPreferences; renders toggle switches per preference entry

website/src/components/settings/Timezone.intent: Timezone selector dropdown that updates the global TimezoneContext
website/src/components/settings/Timezone.notes: Compact mode for sidebar; reads/writes via useTimezone context

website/src/components/shared/AddressAut.intent: Google Places API powered address autocomplete that fills Vietnamese address fields on selection
website/src/components/shared/AddressAut.notes: Uses REST API directly to bypass AutocompleteService; parses structured address components

website/src/components/shared/AddressAut.intent: Test harness page to verify Google Places API integration is working correctly
website/src/components/shared/AddressAut.notes: Dev/testing utility; shows address details and event logs in the UI

website/src/components/shared/BankSelect.intent: Searchable Vietnamese bank dropdown with BIN, code, and short name display
website/src/components/shared/BankSelect.notes: Accent-insensitive search via normalizeText; fetches bank list from external API

website/src/components/shared/ComboboxIn.intent: Free-text input with dropdown suggestions filtered from a provided options array
website/src/components/shared/ComboboxIn.notes: Hybrid input: user can type anything or select from suggestions

website/src/components/shared/CustomerNa.intent: Clickable customer name that navigates to /customers/:id, falls back to span if no ID
website/src/components/shared/CustomerNa.notes: Stops click propagation; used in appointment cards and table rows

website/src/components/shared/CustomerSe.intent: Searchable customer dropdown with avatar initials and add-new option
website/src/components/shared/CustomerSe.notes: Accent-insensitive search; used in AppointmentForm, ServiceForm, PaymentForm

website/src/components/shared/CustomerSo.intent: Dropdown to select how a customer found the clinic (referral source)
website/src/components/shared/CustomerSo.notes: Reads source list from CUSTOMER_SOURCES in mockCustomerForm

website/src/components/shared/DataTable..intent: Sortable, paginated data table with configurable columns and custom cell renderers
website/src/components/shared/DataTable..notes: Generic component used across Customers, Employees, Services, Locations; client-side sort

website/src/components/shared/DoctorSele.intent: Searchable doctor/employee dropdown with filterRoles prop to limit shown roles
website/src/components/shared/DoctorSele.notes: Used in AppointmentForm, ServiceForm, CalendarFilter; accent-insensitive search

website/src/components/shared/DoctorSele.intent: Unit tests for DoctorSelector role filtering behavior
website/src/components/shared/DoctorSele.notes: Vitest + React Testing Library; verifies filterRoles prop limits displayed options

website/src/components/shared/FilterByDo.intent: Doctor filter dropdown accepting DoctorOption array as props for list and calendar filtering
website/src/components/shared/FilterByDo.notes: Props-driven not hook-driven; falls back to All Doctors when list empty

website/src/components/shared/FilterByLo.intent: Location filter dropdown synced globally via LocationContext across all pages
website/src/components/shared/FilterByLo.notes: Used on Overview, Calendar, Customers, Appointments, Employees; All Locations option

website/src/components/shared/ImageUploa.intent: Photo upload component with preview and file input for customer and employee profiles
website/src/components/shared/ImageUploa.notes: Supports sm/md/lg sizes; accepts base64 URL string as value

website/src/components/shared/index.ts.intent: Barrel export for shared components (currently only AddressAutocomplete)
website/src/components/shared/index.ts.notes: Minimal barrel; most shared components imported directly

website/src/components/shared/LocationSe.intent: Branch location selector dropdown for forms, distinct from the global FilterByLocation
website/src/components/shared/LocationSe.notes: Used in CustomerForm, EmployeeForm, AppointmentForm, ServiceForm

website/src/components/shared/Notificati.intent: Recent system alerts panel showing appointment, payment, and customer notifications
website/src/components/shared/Notificati.notes: Uses Notification type from common types; currently shows mock data

website/src/components/shared/QuickActio.intent: Quick action buttons bar for common clinic actions (add appointment, customer, payment, service)
website/src/components/shared/QuickActio.notes: Reads QUICK_ACTIONS from mockDashboard; presentational bar

website/src/components/shared/QuickAddAp.intent: Floating action button that opens AppointmentForm modal for quick appointment creation
website/src/components/shared/QuickAddAp.notes: Used in Overview and Calendar headers; reads selected location from LocationContext

website/src/components/shared/ReferralCo.intent: Referral code input with validation against employee codes and visual success/error feedback
website/src/components/shared/ReferralCo.notes: Validates against MOCK_REFERRAL_CODES; shows matched employee name on success

website/src/components/shared/SearchBar..intent: Debounced search input with magnifier icon and clear button
website/src/components/shared/SearchBar..notes: debounceMs prop default 300ms; used across Customers, Employees, Services, Website

website/src/components/shared/ServiceCat.intent: Searchable service catalog dropdown showing service name, type, and price
website/src/components/shared/ServiceCat.notes: Accent-insensitive search; used in ServiceForm and Settings

website/src/components/shared/StatusBadg.intent: Colored pill badge for entity status with preset variants (active, pending, cancelled, etc.)
website/src/components/shared/StatusBadg.notes: Variant-driven Tailwind classes; exported StatusVariant type used across tables

website/src/components/shared/StatusDrop.intent: Clickable status badge that opens a dropdown to change status inline
website/src/components/shared/StatusDrop.notes: Closes on outside click; used in ServiceHistoryList and ServiceHistory

website/src/components/shared/VersionDis.intent: Sidebar footer widget showing app version, update availability notification, and release notes link
website/src/components/shared/VersionDis.notes: Uses useVersionCheck hook; polls every 5 min; hover tooltip shows build time and git branch

website/src/components/ui/DatePicker.tsx.intent: Custom date picker popover with month navigation, orange accent design, and YYYY-MM-DD value format
website/src/components/ui/DatePicker.tsx.notes: No external date library; pure React; used in AppointmentForm, EditAppointmentModal, ServiceForm

website/src/components/ui/TimePicker.tsx.intent: Custom time picker dropdown with HH:MM format and 30-minute slot options
website/src/components/ui/TimePicker.tsx.notes: Matches DatePicker aesthetic; orange accents; used in AppointmentForm and EditAppointmentModal

website/src/components/website/PageEdito.intent: Rich text editor panel for website page content with formatting toolbar
website/src/components/website/PageEdito.notes: Toolbar-driven formatting; saves via onSave callback

website/src/components/website/PageList..intent: DataTable listing website pages with status badges, search, and status filter
website/src/components/website/PageList..notes: Uses DataTable and StatusBadge; edit/preview actions per row

website/src/components/website/SEOManage.intent: Per-page SEO metadata editor (title, description, keywords, OG image) with page selector
website/src/components/website/SEOManage.notes: Reads from MOCK_PAGES; shows character count and validation warnings

website/src/components/website/ServiceCa.intent: Public service listing manager with search, category filter, visibility toggle, and drag-reorder handle
website/src/components/website/ServiceCa.notes: Reads SERVICE_CATEGORIES from mockWebsite; drag handle UI (reorder not yet wired)

website/src/hooks/useAppointments.ts.intent: Appointment CRUD and check-in status management with real API integration and optimistic updates
website/src/hooks/useAppointments.ts.notes: Fetches from /api/Appointments; manages check-in transitions locally; debounced refresh

website/src/hooks/useBankSettings.ts.intent: Loads and persists clinic bank account settings (BIN, account number, name) via API
website/src/hooks/useBankSettings.ts.notes: GET/PUT /api/BankSettings; used by VietQrModal and BankSettingsForm

website/src/hooks/useBankSettings.test.t.intent: Unit tests for useBankSettings hook covering load, update, and error states

website/src/hooks/useCalendarData.ts.intent: Calendar page state: view mode, date navigation, appointment fetching, and timezone-aware filtering
website/src/hooks/useCalendarData.ts.notes: Maps API appointments to CalendarAppointment via calendarUtils; uses TimezoneContext

website/src/hooks/useClientIp.ts.intent: Detects client IP address for IP access control enforcement
website/src/hooks/useClientIp.ts.notes: Fetches from external IP detection service; used by AuthContext and IpAccessControl

website/src/hooks/useCustomerPayments.ts.intent: Fetches and manages payment records for a specific customer with create and void operations
website/src/hooks/useCustomerPayments.ts.notes: Scoped to a single customerId; used inside CustomerProfile

website/src/hooks/useCustomerProfile.ts.intent: Fetches a single customer full profile including balance, appointments, and partner fields from API
website/src/hooks/useCustomerProfile.ts.notes: Calls fetchPartnerById + fetchAppointments + fetchCustomerBalance; 87-field partner record

website/src/hooks/useCustomers.ts.intent: Customer CRUD, search, and location-filter hook connected to real PostgreSQL API
website/src/hooks/useCustomers.ts.notes: Fetches from /api/Partners where customer=true; debounced search; aborts stale requests

website/src/hooks/useDashboardStats.ts.intent: Computes dashboard KPI stat cards from real API data (partners, appointments, saleorders)
website/src/hooks/useDashboardStats.ts.notes: Returns StatCardData array for StatCardModule; fetches from three API endpoints

website/src/hooks/useDeposits.ts.intent: Manages deposit wallet transactions including top-up and balance fetch for a customer
website/src/hooks/useDeposits.ts.notes: Wraps fetchPayments + createPayment + fetchCustomerBalance from API

website/src/hooks/useDragReschedule.ts.intent: Drag-and-drop rescheduling state management for moving appointments between calendar slots
website/src/hooks/useDragReschedule.ts.notes: Tracks drag state locally; actual API persist is stubbed; used in Calendar page

website/src/hooks/useEmployees.ts.intent: Fetches and filters employee list from real API with location, role, tier, and search filters
website/src/hooks/useEmployees.ts.notes: Maps ApiEmployee to Employee; infers roles from doctor/dentist/receptionist DB flags

website/src/hooks/useExternalCheckups.ts.intent: Fetches external health checkup images for a customer from hosoonline.com via API
website/src/hooks/useExternalCheckups.ts.notes: Keyed by customerCode; skips fetch if code is null; used by HealthCheckupGallery

website/src/hooks/useFormValidation.ts.intent: Generic form validation hook with per-field rules, error state, and touched tracking
website/src/hooks/useFormValidation.ts.notes: Rule-based validation; returns errors map and validate/clearErrors functions

website/src/hooks/useIpAccessControl.ts.intent: IP access control state management for whitelist/blacklist entries, mode toggle, and IP validation
website/src/hooks/useIpAccessControl.ts.notes: Computes stats and check results; uses ipValidation utilities for CIDR and range parsing

website/src/hooks/useLocations.ts.intent: Fetches clinic branches from real API and maps ApiCompany to LocationBranch with search and status filters
website/src/hooks/useLocations.ts.notes: Computes totalStats and per-location metrics; used across Customers, Employees, Appointments, Overview

website/src/hooks/useMonthlyPlans.ts.intent: Monthly installment plan CRUD with real API persistence and status-based filtering
website/src/hooks/useMonthlyPlans.ts.notes: Calls fetchMonthlyPlans, createMonthlyPlan, markInstallmentPaid; maps ApiMonthlyPlan to MonthlyPlan

website/src/hooks/useOverviewAppointment.intent: Three-zone appointment flow for Overview: top-level status (Zone 3) and check-in status (Zone 1)
website/src/hooks/useOverviewAppointment.notes: Fetches today appointments; timezone-aware filtering via TimezoneContext

website/src/hooks/useOverviewAppointment.intent: Unit tests for useOverviewAppointments covering status transitions and filtering

website/src/hooks/useOverviewData.ts.intent: Overview page data: locations list, revenue chart data from real API
website/src/hooks/useOverviewData.ts.notes: Fetches companies + saleorders; generates monthly revenue vs 200M VND target chart data

website/src/hooks/usePayment.ts.intent: Payment operations, wallet management, and outstanding balance aggregation from real API
website/src/hooks/usePayment.ts.notes: Fetches payments, saleorders, dotkhams, customer balance; computes stats; voids payments

website/src/hooks/usePermissionBoard.ts.intent: Permission board state: loads permission groups, employee assignments, and company list from API

website/src/hooks/usePermissionGroups.ts.intent: Permission group CRUD with employee assignment management and location scoping from real API
website/src/hooks/usePermissionGroups.ts.notes: Fetches groups + employee permissions + companies; updates via updateEmployeePermission API

website/src/hooks/usePermissions.ts.intent: Permission checking hook backed by real API that resolves which actions the current user can perform
website/src/hooks/usePermissions.ts.notes: Uses AuthContext user ID to fetch permission groups; hasPermission(module, action) pattern

website/src/hooks/useProducts.ts.intent: Fetches product catalog from API for use in ServiceForm and ServiceCatalog page
website/src/hooks/useProducts.ts.notes: Maps ApiProduct to Product; used where service catalog selection is needed

website/src/hooks/useRelationshipsData.t.intent: State management for Relationships page: active tab, role selection, and permission data from real API
website/src/hooks/useRelationshipsData.t.notes: Fetches permission groups; uses ENTITY_NODES/ENTITY_RELATIONS from entityGraph constants

website/src/hooks/useServices.ts.intent: Service record CRUD from API (Sale Orders), status filtering, and multi-visit tracking
website/src/hooks/useServices.ts.notes: Maps saleorders to ServiceRecord; creates saleorder+saleorderline; tracks visit counts

website/src/hooks/useSettings.ts.intent: Settings state management with real API for customer sources, system preferences, service catalog, and roles
website/src/hooks/useSettings.ts.notes: Exports multiple named hooks for each settings subsystem; backed by real API endpoints

website/src/hooks/useTodaySchedule.ts.intent: Fetches today appointments mapped to CalendarAppointment format for schedule display
website/src/hooks/useTodaySchedule.ts.notes: Uses mapApiAppointmentToCalendar utility; filters to current date only

website/src/hooks/useUniqueCheck.ts.intent: Debounced uniqueness check for phone/email fields to prevent duplicate customer records
website/src/hooks/useUniqueCheck.ts.notes: Debounces 500ms; cancels inflight checks; used in WalkInForm and AddCustomerForm

website/src/hooks/useVersionCheck.ts.intent: Polls /version.json every 5 minutes to detect new deployments and trigger update notification
website/src/hooks/useVersionCheck.ts.notes: Compares version string; applyUpdate() reloads the page; used by VersionDisplay component

website/src/hooks/useWebsiteData.ts.intent: Website CMS state management with real API for pages CRUD, search, and status filtering
website/src/hooks/useWebsiteData.ts.notes: Fetches/creates/updates/deletes website pages via API; maps ApiWebsitePage to WebsitePage

website/src/contexts/AppointmentHoverCon.intent: Bidirectional hover linking between PatientCheckIn (Zone 1) and TodayAppointments (Zone 3)
website/src/contexts/AppointmentHoverCon.notes: Uses ref-based callbacks to avoid re-render cascade; wraps Overview children

website/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx.intent: Global auth state providing current user, login/logout, and permission checking for all pages
website/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx.notes: Calls /api/auth/login and /api/auth/me; stores session; hasPermission derived from user roles

website/src/contexts/LocationContext.tsx.intent: Global location filter state synced across all pages with auto-lock for restricted users
website/src/contexts/LocationContext.tsx.notes: Provides selectedLocationId and isSingleLocation; auto-locks if user has restricted location scope

website/src/contexts/TimezoneContext.tsx.intent: Global timezone state used by calendar and appointment hooks for date-aware filtering
website/src/contexts/TimezoneContext.tsx.notes: Persists selected timezone; Vietnam (Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh) is the default; exposes availableTimezones

website/src/lib/api.ts.intent: Centralized API client for the tgclinic-api backend with typed fetch functions for all entities
website/src/lib/api.ts.notes: Reads VITE_API_URL; all functions throw typed errors; backend uses search_path=dbo

website/src/lib/calendarUtils.ts.intent: Utilities to map API appointment objects to CalendarAppointment type used by calendar views
website/src/lib/calendarUtils.ts.notes: calculateEndTime adds durationMinutes to startTime; default 30-min duration if null

website/src/lib/dateUtils.ts.intent: Date utilities with timezone support including available timezone list and formatting helpers
website/src/lib/dateUtils.ts.notes: Vietnam timezone listed first as default; used by TimezoneContext

website/src/lib/formatting.ts.intent: Formatting utilities including Vietnamese Dong (VND) currency formatter
website/src/lib/formatting.ts.notes: Uses Intl.NumberFormat vi-VN with appended dong symbol; used across all monetary displays

website/src/lib/ipAccessMiddleware.ts.intent: Pure function to check if an IP is allowed given IP access settings (whitelist/blacklist/allow_all)
website/src/lib/ipAccessMiddleware.ts.notes: Framework-agnostic; usable on both client and server; depends on ipValidation utilities

website/src/lib/ipValidation.ts.intent: IPv4 validation and range checking utilities for IP access control (CIDR, private ranges)
website/src/lib/ipValidation.ts.notes: Regex-based IPv4 validation; private range detection; CIDR mask support

website/src/lib/utils.ts.intent: Core utilities: Tailwind class merging (cn) and accent-insensitive Vietnamese text normalizer
website/src/lib/utils.ts.notes: normalizeText decomposes Unicode NFD and strips diacritics for search; cn wraps clsx+twMerge

website/src/lib/utils.test.ts.intent: Unit tests for utils library covering cn and normalizeText functions

website/src/lib/vietqr.ts.intent: VietQR URL builder and payment description generator for bank transfer QR codes
website/src/lib/vietqr.ts.notes: Builds img.vietqr.io URL with BIN, account, amount, and encoded description

website/src/lib/vietqr.test.ts.intent: Unit tests for vietqr URL builder and payment description functions

website/src/types/appointment.ts.intent: Appointment and check-in status type definitions shared across calendar, form, and check-in components
website/src/types/appointment.ts.notes: Source of truth for appointment status enums; re-exported via data/mockAppointments.ts

website/src/types/common.ts.intent: Shared type definitions for Notification, RevenueDataPoint, LocationOption, and QUICK_ACTIONS
website/src/types/common.ts.notes: Cross-domain shared types used by Overview, hooks, and shared components

website/src/types/customer.ts.intent: Customer entity type definitions including Customer, CustomerPhoto, CustomerDeposit, and form types
website/src/types/customer.ts.notes: Source of truth for all customer-related types; re-exported via data mock files

website/src/types/employee.ts.intent: Employee entity type definitions including roles, tiers, schedule blocks, and DB flag mappings
website/src/types/employee.ts.notes: inferRoleFromFlags maps doctor/dentist/receptionist boolean flags from DB to EmployeeRole

website/src/types/ipAccessControl.ts.intent: IP access control type definitions for entries, settings, modes, and validation results
website/src/types/ipAccessControl.ts.notes: Used by useIpAccessControl hook, IpAccessControl component, and ipAccessMiddleware

website/src/types/location.ts.intent: Location/branch type definitions including LocationBranch, LocationMetrics, and status types
website/src/types/location.ts.notes: Source of truth for location types; re-exported via data/mockLocations.ts

website/src/types/monthlyPlans.ts.intent: Monthly payment plan type definitions for plans, installments, and their status enums
website/src/types/monthlyPlans.ts.notes: Source of truth for installment plan types; re-exported via data/mockMonthlyPlans.ts

website/src/types/payment.ts.intent: Payment entity type definitions including methods, statuses, wallet transactions, and outstanding balances
website/src/types/payment.ts.notes: Source of truth for all payment types; re-exported via data/mockPayment.ts

website/src/types/permissions.ts.intent: Permission and Role type definitions for the RBAC system
website/src/types/permissions.ts.notes: Used by usePermissions, useRelationshipsData, PermissionMatrix, and EntityRelationshipMap

website/src/types/service.ts.intent: Service record type definitions including catalog items, visit tracking, and status enums
website/src/types/service.ts.notes: Source of truth for service types; re-exported via data/mockServices.ts

website/src/types/settings.ts.intent: Settings type definitions for system preferences, customer sources, and catalog services
website/src/types/settings.ts.notes: Source of truth for settings types; re-exported via data/mockSettings.ts

website/src/types/use-places-autocomplet.intent: Type declarations for the use-places-autocomplete library bridging Google Maps API types
website/src/types/use-places-autocomplet.notes: Ambient module declaration; extends google.maps types for place suggestions

website/src/types/version.d.ts.intent: Global declarations for Vite build-time injected version constants
website/src/types/version.d.ts.notes: Declares globals injected by vite.config.ts define block

website/src/types/website.ts.intent: Website CMS type definitions for pages, SEO metadata, and service listings
website/src/types/website.ts.notes: Source of truth for CMS types; re-exported via data/mockWebsite.ts

website/src/constants/entityGraph.ts.intent: Static entity relationship graph data (nodes and relations) for the architecture visualization
website/src/constants/entityGraph.ts.notes: Node types: core|support|external; relation types: one-to-many|many-to-many|one-to-one

website/src/constants/index.ts.intent: Shared application constants including status colors, appointment types, routes, and calendar config
website/src/constants/index.ts.notes: Used across ALL_COMPONENTS; APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS is canonical color source for calendar cards

website/src/constants/statusStyles.ts.intent: Centralized status label and Tailwind style maps for all entity states across the app
website/src/constants/statusStyles.ts.notes: Extracted from mock files for centralized style management; imported by type files and data files

website/src/data/mockAppointments.ts.intent: Re-exports appointment types and check-in constants from /types/appointment.ts
website/src/data/mockAppointments.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; historical filename kept for import compatibility

website/src/data/mockCalendar.ts.intent: Re-exports calendar appointment types and status style constants
website/src/data/mockCalendar.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; imports from types/appointment and constants/statusStyles

website/src/data/mockCustomerForm.ts.intent: Re-exports customer form types and provides MOCK_REFERRAL_CODES and CUSTOMER_SOURCES static data
website/src/data/mockCustomerForm.ts.notes: CUSTOMER_SOURCES and MOCK_REFERRAL_CODES are static data still in this file

website/src/data/mockCustomerProfile.ts.intent: Re-exports customer profile sub-types (photos, deposits, transactions, appointments, services)

website/src/data/mockCustomers.ts.intent: Re-exports Customer and CustomerStatus types from /types/customer.ts
website/src/data/mockCustomers.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; historical filename kept for import compatibility

website/src/data/mockDashboard.ts.intent: Re-exports dashboard types and provides QUICK_ACTIONS constant and empty MOCK_NOTIFICATIONS array
website/src/data/mockDashboard.ts.notes: QUICK_ACTIONS sourced from /types/common.ts; MOCK_NOTIFICATIONS is empty (real data from API)

website/src/data/mockEmployees.ts.intent: Re-exports employee types, tier/role style constants, and DB flag mapping utilities
website/src/data/mockEmployees.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; DB flag helpers passed through from /types/employee.ts

website/src/data/mockIpAccessControl.ts.intent: Re-exports IP access control types and provides empty MOCK_IP_ENTRIES stub
website/src/data/mockIpAccessControl.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; MOCK_IP_ENTRIES is empty (real data from API)

website/src/data/mockLocations.ts.intent: Re-exports location types and status style constants plus empty MOCK_LOCATIONS stub
website/src/data/mockLocations.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; real location data comes from /api/Companies

website/src/data/mockMonthlyPlans.ts.intent: Re-exports monthly plan types and provides empty MOCK_MONTHLY_PLANS stub
website/src/data/mockMonthlyPlans.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; real plan data comes from API

website/src/data/mockPayment.ts.intent: Re-exports payment types and provides PAYMENT_STATUS_LABELS and PAYMENT_METHOD_LABELS display maps
website/src/data/mockPayment.ts.notes: Label and style maps are static config; actual payment data comes from real API

website/src/data/mockPermissionGroups.ts.intent: Re-exports permission types and entity graph constants; provides PERMISSIONS and ROLES seed arrays
website/src/data/mockPermissionGroups.ts.notes: PERMISSIONS and ROLES are static seed data used when API returns empty

website/src/data/mockPermissions.ts.intent: Re-exports permission/role types and entity graph constants for relationship visualization
website/src/data/mockPermissions.ts.notes: Thin re-export layer; subset of mockPermissionGroups exports

website/src/data/mockServices.ts.intent: Re-exports service types and provides Vietnamese SERVICE_STATUS_LABELS and VISIT_STATUS_LABELS display maps
website/src/data/mockServices.ts.notes: Labels are Vietnamese; real service data from API

website/src/data/mockSettings.ts.intent: Re-exports settings types and provides DEFAULT_CUSTOMER_SOURCES seed data
website/src/data/mockSettings.ts.notes: DEFAULT_CUSTOMER_SOURCES used as fallback when API returns empty list

website/src/data/mockWebsite.ts.intent: Re-exports CMS types and provides PAGE_STATUS_LABELS, PAGE_TEMPLATES, SERVICE_CATEGORIES, MOCK_PAGES
website/src/data/mockWebsite.ts.notes: MOCK_PAGES used by SEOManager as static seed; other data from real API

website/src/data/serviceCatalog.ts.intent: Complete list of dental service items organized by category sourced from clinic product spreadsheet
website/src/data/serviceCatalog.ts.notes: Static data from Website spreadsheet; fields: code, name, canOrderLab, category, unit
